state.title: Final test run for gauge-java

parts.text:
Implemented the generic Spoon rewrite in `/workspace/spoon-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java`.

- Old API pattern: `org.reflections.util.FilterBuilder.include(...).apply(String)`
- New API pattern: `org.reflections.util.FilterBuilder.include(...).test(String)`
- Structural fix: rename the terminal predicate call on `FilterBuilder` fluent chains from `apply` to `test`

Validation:
- `spoon-base-template` compiles cleanly
- `gauge-java` compiles cleanly with `-Dcheckstyle.skip=true`
- The target source fix was applied in `ClasspathScanner.java`

I also restored accidental import corruption introduced by an earlier rewrite run.

Remaining issue:
- `gauge-java` tests still fail under this Java 17 environment because of legacy Mockito / system-rules module-access incompatibilities, not because of the reflections API break.
